---
name: Animation Request
about: Suggest a new animation to add to the collection
title: "[Animation Request] "
labels: enhancement, animation-request
assignees: ''
---

## Animation Description

Describe the animation you'd like to see added.

## Reference / Inspiration

Link to any reference material — Dribbble shots, other apps, videos, etc.

## Use Case

Where would this animation be useful in a real app?

## Complexity

How complex do you think this animation would be?

- [ ] Simple (basic transitions, opacity, scale)
- [ ] Medium (custom shapes, timing curves, multiple elements)
- [ ] Advanced (geometry effects, canvas, complex state management)

## Would You Like to Contribute This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build this myself!
- [ ] No, just suggesting it for someone else to pick up

## Additional Context

Any other details, mockups, or notes.
